summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WTFHappened app - trending topics explanation platform with AI-generated 3-card explanations

Feed endpoint serving 8+ topics sorted by trend_score
Category filtering working for all categories (finance, tech, ai, crypto, etc.)
Explanation retrieval with complete 3-card explanations
AI explanation generation via Claude working properly

Saved topics retrieval

Category filter pills functional and responsive
Topic card clicks opening explanation view successfully
Explanation view with WHAT/WHY/MATTERS tab switching
Tab switching with proper visual states and animations
Save/bookmark button functionality
Share button opening social card preview modal
Social card preview with template selection (Square/Twitter/Story)
Copy caption functionality
Modal close functionality
Back button navigation from explanation to feed
Bottom navigation between Trending/Explain/Saved tabs

AI explanation generation from user input
Saved topics view with empty state handling

Responsive design and mobile-friendly layout
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (25/26 features working)
